product.name: ArWoWear T12 Flame Pro
product.categorySourceGroup: Flame Retardant, Vat Dyed, Workwear Fabrics Resistant up to 100 Wash
product.titleDescriptor: 100% Cotton Satin, Flame Retardant Fabric, 450 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 450 g/m², 100% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), 4/1 Satin Fabric
descriptions: ArWoWear T12 Flame Pro is heavy weight 450 g/m², 100% cotton, vat dyed, flame retardant workwear fabric.
It has flame retardant function with EN ISO 11612 and EN ISO 11611 certification.
It is durable up to 100 washing. Suitable for shipyard welders in cold climates.
100% Cotton Satin, Flame Retardant Fabric, 450 gr/m'2
450 g/m², 100% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Flame Retardant (100 Wash Resistant), 4/1 Satin Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>2000N; Weft>1400N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>35N; Weft>30N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612
functionIconLabels: >> ArWoWear T12 Flame Pro Data Sheet

evidence: Suitable for shipyard welders in cold climates.
matches.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN ISO 11611 welding protection standard and product description states suitability for welders, directly supporting the welding/metallurgy application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Arc protection (EN 61482) and ATPV rating are present, but no explicit statement of use in electrical utility or high-voltage energy sector work; arc-flash protection alone is insufficient per rules.
EN ISO 11612 flame and heat protection certification is present, but there is no explicit mention of firefighting, turnout gear, or fire brigade use.
Shipyard context is mentioned but this refers to welding work location, not vessel/vehicle transport use of the fabric itself.
